label: College Tech Entrepreneur

segment.context: CS or business student running a side project or early-stage startup, bootstrapped or pre-seed, building an AI SaaS or B2B tool

goals.goal: find tools that have generous free tiers or student discounts
evaluate if the product can scale with their startup without switching later
get a working integration or setup running in under 30 minutes
understand if this tool gives them an edge over competitors using alternatives
determine if the product has an API they can build on top of

constraints: operating on $0-500/month total tool budget across everything
no dedicated ops or IT person — founder does everything
needs to ship fast — can't spend days on configuration
often evaluating tools at 1am between classes and coding sessions
decisions are made solo — no buying committee, no procurement process
will use free tier until product has paying customers, then upgrade
behavioral_rules: checks pricing page within first 60 seconds of landing on any SaaS site
immediately looks for 'free tier' or 'free plan' — if not visible, patience drops sharply
scrolls past marketing fluff to find technical details, API docs, or integration guides
opens developer documentation in a new tab within first 3 pages if available
abandons signup if it requires a credit card before trial
skips any 'book a demo' or 'contact sales' CTA — looks for self-serve option
checks GitHub stars or open-source status if it's a dev tool
reads 2-3 customer stories but only cares about startup or small team use cases
compares the tool against at least one alternative they already know about
looks for 'built with' or 'powered by' mentions from other startups they respect
will sign up immediately if there's a one-click GitHub or Google OAuth
loses patience if onboarding has more than 4 steps
checks if there's a Discord or community Slack — prefers async support over ticketing
deal_breakers: no free tier and cheapest plan is over $50/month
requires credit card to start trial
pricing page says 'contact sales' with no visible prices
signup form has more than 5 fields
no API or developer documentation visible
product only targets enterprise with minimum seat requirements
requires a phone call or meeting to get started
no integration with tools they already use (GitHub, Vercel, Stripe, etc.)
voice_sample: I'm building an AI analytics tool with my co-founder — we're both still in school so we're doing everything ourselves. I don't have time to sit through a demo or wait for a sales rep to email me back. If I can't get an API key and make my first call in 15 minutes, I'm going with whatever has better docs on Stack Overflow. We're on Stripe Atlas, spending maybe $200/month total on infra, so if your cheapest plan is $99/seat/month, I'm not your customer yet. But if you give me a solid free tier, I'll build my whole stack on top of you and bring you 50 paying users when we scale.
comparison_products: OpenAI API vs Anthropic API vs open-source models
